title: Multicolored Allays
description: Every color, from the default to the eleven new shades, has an equal opportunity to be selected, making it simply a matter of chance.
body: Have you ever gazed upon an alleyway and thought to yourself, "What if it could be bathed in eleven additional hues?" I know I have. That is precisely why I created this texture pack. Every color, from the default to the eleven new shades, has an equal opportunity to be selected, making it simply a matter of chance.
